data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Cancellation and no-show rates', but the evidence provided only mentions a no-show rate of 8% without detailing how this rate is calculated or tracked. There is no concrete API read or persisted state check that confirms the mechanisms for tracking cancellations and no-shows, leading to a gap in the evidence. The lack of specific details on how these metrics are derived means the requirement cannot be considered satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of how cancellation and no-show rates are tracked or calculated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed evidence for cancellation and no-show tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls that verify the tracking of cancellation and no-show rates.
